instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data from physical assets is streamed via MQTT in real-time, capturing live measurements to ensure continuous synchronization between the physical and digital components with minimal latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model, defined as a UML class diagram, structures components including DataTrace (for contextual data collection), Source (data origin), and Asset (physical entities), with defined relationships for aggregation and abstraction of data traces."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an interoperability standard, MQTT for real-time data exchange, and interfaces with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for industrial automation processes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML for systems engineering modeling, AADL for architecture description, ACME for component-based architecture, and MontiArc for modular architecture design. Interoperability is addressed through the integration of heterogeneous modeling notations and tools as per MBSE practices."
]
